name: Draper Occupational Illness Notice Deadlines

mainEntity.name: Deadlines for notice of occupational illness in Draper?
mainEntity.text: Deadlines for notice of occupational illness in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer in writing within 180 days of knowledge in Draper; 3-year filing limit follows.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Verbal notice suffices initially but document. Late notice excused if employer not prejudiced. Draper supervisors often ignore; preserve via certified mail.[5]

description: Notify employer in writing within 180 days of knowledge in Draper; 3-year filing limit follows.[5]
